📥 Download

Download TULASI STORES

Available on Android, Windows, and Web.

📱

Android

Android 5.0+ ~98 MB v10.0.0
DOWNLOAD Android APK
🪟

Windows

Windows 10+ ~45 MB v10.0.0
Get it from Microsoft Store
or direct download
⬇ Download Installer (.exe)
🌐

Web App

Any modern browser No install needed Always latest
OPEN IN Browser

🔒 Safe & secure. No malware. No ads. No hidden charges.

Installation Guide

Step-by-step instructions for each platform.

📱 Android Installation

1

Open Google Play Store on your phone

2

Search for "TULASI STORES" or "Tulasi Stores"

3

Tap Install — under 25 MB

4

Open the app, sign up, and start billing!

🪟 Windows Installation

⭐ Recommended: Microsoft Store

1

Open Microsoft Store on your PC

2

Search "TULASI STORES" or click the Store button above

3

Click Install — auto-updates enabled!

Or install manually:

1

Click the Download Installer button above

2

Run the downloaded TulasiStores_Setup.exe file

3

Click Install — the app installs automatically

4

Find Tulasi Stores in Start Menu and sign in!

✅ Includes VC++ Runtime. Works on any Windows 10+ PC.

🌐 Web App

1

Open any modern browser (Chrome, Firefox, Edge, Safari)

2

Go to stores.tulasierp.com/app

3

Sign up or sign in — no installation needed

4

Optionally "Add to Home Screen" for app-like experience

System Requirements

Minimum specs to run TULASI STORES.

Requirement Android Windows Web
OS Version 5.0 (Lollipop)+ Windows 10+ Any
RAM 2 GB 4 GB 2 GB
Storage 100 MB free 200 MB free —
Internet Optional* Optional* Required
Camera For barcode scan Not needed For barcode scan
Bluetooth For thermal printer For thermal printer Not supported

* Tulasi Stores works fully offline. Internet needed only for initial sign-up and cloud sync.

What's New

Latest version: v10.0.0

v10.0.0
Initial Release — Feb 2026
Fast POS billing with barcode scanner
Customer khata management with payment tracking
GST-compliant invoices and receipt printing
Hindi, English & Telugu language support
Inventory management with low-stock alerts
Sales reports with interactive charts
Bluetooth thermal printer support (58mm/80mm)
Voice input for product search
Offline-first with cloud sync
Dark mode & Light mode themes
Cash, UPI, Credit & Razorpay payments
Multi-platform: Android, Windows, Web

Start Billing in 5 Minutes

Simple. Powerful. Built for Indian retailers.
